meaning: [域] Lao People's Republic ,老挝人民共和国
examples: He was the best dancer in LA.
I'm scheduled to arrive in LA at 5 o'clock.
He sailed westward from Palos de la Frontera.
He bought the entertainment and merchandising rights to Olie from creator William Joyce of Shreveport, La.
We regained the light and pushed on to La Bugue and our heavenly omelets and wine.
